description: Dashboard for cert-manager Prometheus metrics covering certificate health, expiry timelines, ACME client activity, controller performance, and runtime resource usage.
title: Cert-Manager Dashboard

namespace.name: namespace
namespace.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') AS namespace FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000

issuer_name.name: issuer_name
issuer_name.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'issuer_name') AS issuer_name FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') IN {{.namespace}} AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000

controller.name: controller
controller.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'controller') AS controller FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_controller_sync_call_count' AND unix_milli >= toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) * 1000

filter.expression: namespace in $namespace AND status != '200' AND status != '201'
